title: GitHub Issues import/export buttons on dashboard Issues page
description: Add Import and Export buttons to the dashboard Issues page. Import pulls issues from the configured GitHub repo into the ledger. Export pushes ledger issues to GitHub. Both call backend API endpoints that delegate to core/gh.ts.
acceptance: Dashboard Issues page shows 'Import from GitHub' and 'Export to GitHub' buttons when a repo is configured.
Import button opens a dialog: repo input field + Import button. Calls POST /api/gh/import {repo}.
Export button: dialog with repo input + Export button. Calls POST /api/gh/export {repo}.
Backend API routes POST /api/gh/import and POST /api/gh/export are thin wrappers over core/gh.ts functions and return CommandResult envelopes.
After import/export, the issues list refreshes to show new records.
No new dependencies; uses existing Bun.fetch.
typecheck, biome check, and waystation validate all clean.
notes: Dashboard server already has pattern for API routes (thin wrappers over core). Two new routes: POST /api/gh/import {repo} → importGitHubIssues(root, repo, token) and POST /api/gh/export {repo} → exportGitHubIssues(root, repo, token). Token from process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN. Frontend: reuses existing dialog pattern (no modal library — simple in-page form). Repo field defaults to the git remote origin if detectable (try git remote get-url origin).
